Stick a shield onto a spear
advancements.hasoook.not_just_another_fi: Let the firework spear explode in your hands
advancements.hasoook.record_button.title: Record Button
advancements.hasoook.record_button.descr: Capture a sound with an Echo Bottle
advancements.hasoook.echo_for_echo.title: Echo for Echo
advancements.hasoook.echo_for_echo.descr: Use a Sonic Boom Bottle to attack the Warden with a sonic boom
advancements.hasoook.old_head.title: Old Head
advancements.hasoook.old_head.descriptio: Cut off a creature's head with Louis Shears
advancements.hasoook.head_connector.desc: Attach a mob head to a headless creature
block.hasoook.phantom_lamp.too_early: It's too early to sleep now
message.hasoook.phantom_lamp.charge_star: §dPhantom Lamp begins charging — stay within 3 blocks!
message.hasoook.phantom_lamp.broken: §cThis Phantom Lamp is broken and unusable
message.hasoook.phantom_lamp.repaired_no: §7This Phantom Lamp has been repaired. It can no longer freeze mobs, but you can still sleep safely
message.hasoook.phantom_lamp.busy: §7The Phantom Lamp is busy, try again later
message.hasoook.phantom_lamp.grab: §bThe Phantom Lamp summons a Phantom, grabbing %s hostile mobs into the sky!
message.hasoook.phantom_lamp.grab_none: §7The Phantom Lamp flickers, but there are no hostile mobs nearby
tooltip.hasoook.phantom_lamp.pristine: §bPristine Phantom Lamp — can freeze nearby creatures
tooltip.hasoook.phantom_lamp.broken: §cBroken Phantom Lamp — repair with 3 Phantom Membranes in an Anvil
tooltip.hasoook.phantom_lamp.repaired: §aRepaired Phantom Lamp — sleep safely near monsters
message.hasoook.villager_refuse_smelly: You smell too bad! The villager refuses to trade.
message.hasoook.copper_golem.battle_mode: Copper Golem returned to normal mode.
message.hasoook.copper_golem.tnt_taken: Copper Golem retrieved TNT from a copper chest!
message.hasoook.camera_bind: §bCamera bound to %s, press sneak to detach
message.hasoook.debtshot.debt: Good news! You now owe %s arrow(s)!
message.hasoook.debtshot.cleared: Bad news! You owed %s arrow(s) but you just paid them off!
hasoook.config.api_key.tooltip: Your API key for the AI painting analysis service. Required for the feature to work.
hasoook.config.api_url.tooltip: The endpoint URL for the AI painting analysis service.
hasoook.config.model_name.tooltip: The model identifier used for AI painting analysis.
hasoook.config.limit_drops.tooltip: When enabled, breaking blocks will only drop dye from special blocks.
hasoook.config.painting_task_chance.tool: Set to 0 to disable. Otherwise, the chance is 1 in X (e.g. 10 = 10% chance).
hasoook.config.give_on_join.tooltip: When enabled, gives a Magic Paintbrush and Paper plus a Book and Quill upon joining or respawning, if the player does not already own the magic item.
hasoook.config.give_map.tooltip: When enabled, a map will be created upon successful painting recognition (both normal and quest mode).
hasoook.config.display_map.tooltip: When enabled, players can see the contents of maps held by other players.
hasoook.config.piston_spear_length.toolt: Sets the maximum distance the Piston Spear can extend. Higher values allow the spear to reach farther.
hasoook.config.head_cut_damage_percent.t: Percentage of max health dealt as damage when a head is cut off. 0.0 = no damage, 1.0 = instant death.
hasoook.config.headless_blindness.toolti: When enabled, entities and players continuously gain the Blindness effect while in a headless state.
